titleJa: control plane と eval discipline が、agent 導入の速度を決め始める
titleEn: Control planes and evaluation discipline are starting to set the pace of agent adoption
summaryJa: Anthropic の evals 記事まで含めると、agent を supervised worker として扱う発想がよりはっきりし、control plane と regression evaluation の有無が rollout 速度を左右している。
summaryEn: Especially after Anthropic's evaluation article, the idea of agents as supervised workers becomes clearer, and the presence of a control plane plus regression evaluation starts to determine rollout speed.

publishedSources.label: RE-Bench: Evaluating Frontier AI R&D Capabilities of Language Model Agents against Human Experts
The BrowserGym Ecosystem for Web Agent Research
Microsoft Azure: Agent Factory, designing the open agentic web stack
Microsoft: Introducing multi-agent workflows in Azure AI Foundry Agent Service
Anthropic: Demystifying evals for AI agents
